title: Complementary Filter IMU Attitude Fusion
design_question: How to fuse gyro and accelerometer for stable tilt estimation with minimal CPU load?
selected_approach: θ = α·(θ_prev + ω·dt) + (1−α)·θ_accel, α=0.98 at 200 Hz. Computationally trivial vs Kalman filter.
rationale: Complementary filter: one multiply-add per axis per cycle—negligible on any MCU. Stable and tunable via α. Accuracy sufficient for ±5° balance target.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Lower noise but matrix operations heavy on 8-bit MCU; complementary filter meets spec—use Kalman if upgrading to STM32.

verification_notes: FACT: 'Kalman Filter for Sensor Fusion' provides the EKF upgrade path. FACT: 'IMU' confirms gyro drift and need for accel correction.
supporting_fact_titles: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) for Robot Navigation
